coverage_note: The bundled MLH1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from MLH1 DNA mismatch repair, microsatellite stability, replication-error correction, Lynch syndrome biology, and promoter methylation context and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000076242: MLH1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: MLH1 findings should be read against DNA mismatch repair, microsatellite stability, replication-error correction, Lynch syndrome biology, and promoter methylation context; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

MLH1 loss-of-function model is curated as a MLH1 marker for Lynch syndrome review context, Microsatellite instability and colorectal/endometrial tumor biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

MLH1 promoter methylation model is curated as a MLH1 marker for Lynch syndrome review context, Microsatellite instability and colorectal/endometrial tumor biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
